AMALGAMATOR.pages.INITIAL.options.INJECT: Remove 2 [gold]Strike[/gold] cards. Then enchant an Attack card with [purple]Ultimate Strike[/purple].
Remove 2 [gold]Defend[/gold] cards. Then enchant a Skill card with Block with [purple]Ultimate Defend[/purple].
AMALGAMATOR.pages.INJECT_STRIKES.descrip: The Amalgamator condenses strike essence into a single card core, forcing your attack circuit to spike.
AMALGAMATOR.pages.INJECT_DEFENDS.descrip: The Amalgamator welds defensive modules into the card's weave, making each block pulse unnaturally steady.
